mapping_rationale: Class C under Google Inc. DOCUMENTED WHEN-ISSUED WINDOW: Sharadar SEP contains Class C prices 2014-03-27..2014-04-02 (verified 2026-07-11) representing when-issued trading between the record date and the 2014-04-02 distribution; regular-way GOOG from 2014-04-03. GOOG identity is appropriate from 03-27 because the crosswalk maps the Sharadar price series (permaticker 119496 firstpricedate 2014-03-27) - excluding the when-issued days would orphan genuine SEP rows. EXPECTED AMBIGUITY: ticker GOOG denotes two securities 2014-03-27..04-02 (Class A regular-way + Class C when-issued); ticker/date lookups return unresolved there by the frozen invariant - series joins use permaticker
